title: Advanced Clothing
description: A mod that adds clothes such as shirts, hats, sunglasses and more!
body:
If you want a mod capable of giving you a bunch of customization and lots of clothing options, then this is the mod for you!

All clothing items are created from in-game and the mods materials allow for a variety of different options and customisations.

### Features:

Cotton and Cotton Seeds - allows players to grow cotton plants

Other Fabrics and other materials, this includes 

Creeper Bundle - Contains a Creeper Beenie, Shirt, Trousers and Boots.

ClassicThreads - Contains a variety of classic coloured jackets.

Clothing Wardrobe - Allows players to equip clothing items, like hats or jackets within the menu. It also has a Player Preview!

Sewing Machine - Allows players to create clothing in surival using material like cotton, string, silk and more, to create jackets, hats, shirts and shoes.


**The mod is still in beta.**

Any issues with the mod, just comment :)

Hope you enjoy the mod!


Things to consider adding in the future?
Separate clothes system (allows you to wear clothes as well as armor)
Fabric Villagers with a random selection of clothing items, would refresh items daily.
Seasonal Clothing Addons / Bonuses & Benifits of clothing items
Allow for Custom Designs
